description:
## Component: hx-spinner (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 5/6 libraries**

Circular loading indicator for async operations.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)

### API Design
**Properties:** `hx-size` (sm|md|lg), `label` (accessible label, default "Loading"), `variant` (primary|neutral)
**CSS Parts:** `spinner`, `track`, `indicator`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
<hx-spinner hx-size="lg" label="Loading patient records"></hx-spinner>
```

### Healthcare: Data loading, form submission, async search results

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Smooth rotation animation using CSS (not JS)
2. Accessible: role="status", aria-label from label property
3. All sizes consistent with design tokens
4. Works inline and as overlay
title: T1-26: hx-spinner — Circular Loading Indicator
